skills.title: Backend Development
skills.description: Develop scalable backend applications and REST APIs using Python, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL, and modern software engineering best practices.

skills.title: Data Analytics
skills.description: Transform raw data into actionable insights through SQL, Python, Power BI, Tableau, and Excel. Experienced in data cleaning, visualization, reporting, and building automated analytics workflows.

skills.title: Data Engineering
skills.description: Design data pipelines and ETL processes that transform and organize data for analysis. Experience with Databricks, Spark, PostgreSQL, and Python-based data workflows.

skills.title: AI & Automation
skills.description: Build intelligent tools and automation workflows using Python and modern AI technologies to streamline repetitive tasks and accelerate development.

portfolio.title: CardGamePlus
portfolio.description: Built a full-stack collectible card game featuring a custom data-driven gameplay engine, AI opponent, and persistent player progression. The application uses a React frontend with a FastAPI backend, layered architecture, JWT authentication, and runtime object reconstruction to deliver a scalable and extensible gaming experience.

portfolio.title: NBA Defense Analysis
portfolio.description: Developed an end-to-end NBA analytics pipeline that automatically collected 20 years of historical data from Basketball Reference using a custom Python web scraper. The data was cleaned and transformed with SQL before being visualized in interactive Tableau dashboards to analyze the relationship between defensive performance and playoff success.

portfolio.title: Math Engine
portfolio.description: Built a full-stack mathematical computation engine that performs advanced symbolic and numerical calculations across calculus, linear algebra, statistics, geometry, and graphing. The project emphasizes clean software architecture through a modular FastAPI backend, dynamic frontend rendering, and RESTful API design.
